title: Catalog
description: The lean manifest loaded FIRST (and cached offline). Holds the theme taxonomy plus a LIGHTWEIGHT entry per story — enough to search, filter and list WITHOUT downloading any full story. The offline (client-side) search index is built from this file. Full stories are lazy-loaded on demand.

themes.description: Theme taxonomy (tree via 'parent'). Replaces the dropdown — drives faceted filtering.

parent.description: Parent theme id, for a hierarchy.

stories.description: One lightweight entry per story. Keep small — this is the always-loaded index.

keywords.description: Extra search terms incl. transliterations + Arabic forms. The search-index build step normalizes Arabic (strips harakat; unifies alef forms أ إ آ -> ا and ta-marbuta ة -> ه) and folds these in.

temporal_range.description: Time span, for filtering by period and seeding the global time slider. Null/omitted for atemporal stories (e.g. a ritual guide).

url.description: Path to the full story JSON (lazy-loaded, brotli on CDN).

byte_size.description: Compressed size hint, so the client can warn on metered/slow connections.
